races.name: Maiden Special Weight

field.name: Winston Ave
field.notes: Baffert maiden, often well-meant.

field.name: Powershift
field.notes: Pletcher MSW + Irad. Likely tote favorite.

races.pace: 11-horse maiden field. Pace shape unknown without PPs.
races.notes: Opening race. Powershift (Pletcher/Irad) and Silent Way (Prat) likely co-favorites. Pass unless you've studied the program — first race of 14 is no time to bleed bankroll.

races.name: Allowance Optional Claiming

field.name: Memory
field.notes: Baffert + Prat in an allowance.

field.name: Taptastic
field.notes: Asmussen + Irad — likely favorite.

races.pace: Allowance, 12 horses, 1 1/16mi dirt. No prior analysis available.
races.notes: Pass unless you've handicapped from the program. Big field allowances are exacta-trifecta lottery without homework.

races.name: Allowance Optional Claiming

field.name: John Hancock
field.notes: Cox + Irad.

field.name: Praetor
field.notes: Brown + Prat — likely favorite.

races.pace: 14 horses at 1mi dirt — full gate. Pace shape unknown.
races.notes: Big-field allowance. Praetor (Brown/Prat) and John Hancock (Cox/Irad) the morning-line standouts. Without serious handicapping, pass.

races.name: Derby City Distaff
races.age: Fillies & Mares | 4 Year Olds And Up

field.name: Usha
field.notes: Baffert. Solid Distaff player.

field.name: Haulin Ice
field.notes: Also entered Friday Unbridled Sidney (turf). Coupled-effort question.

field.name: Ways and Means
field.notes: ML favorite. 5yo Practical Joke mare. Brown's barn in form.

field.name: Splendora
field.notes: Reigning BC F&M Sprint (G1) winner. 5-race win streak. Undefeated this year. CLASS edge — possible primary play.

field.name: R Disaster
field.notes: Joseph's other entry.

races.pace: Short field of 6 at 7f dirt. Two-horse race between Ways and Means (8-5) and Splendora (2-1). Tactical 7f — speed/pressers preferred.
races.notes: Splendora has the class edge as the reigning BC F&M Sprint G1 champion. 2-1 is fair value. Ways and Means at 8-5 is the underlay — Brown trains both well. Suggested: WIN on #5 Splendora, or $2 exacta box 4-5 ($4).

races.name: Twin Spires Turf Sprint

field.name: My Boy Prince
field.notes: ML favorite.

field.name: Litigation
field.notes: Co-favorite. Irad up.

races.pace: Turf sprint = chaos. Pace is fast by definition; closers can come from off it. Trips matter heavily.
races.notes: Turf sprints are notoriously tough to handicap. 5-1/3-1 favorites My Boy Prince and Litigation lead the pack. Without inside info, consider passing or playing a small exacta box of two short prices.

races.name: Knicks Go Overnight Stakes

field.name: Dragoon Guard
field.notes: Cox + Irad. ML favorite.

field.name: Capital Idea
field.notes: Mott's other entry.

races.pace: Mile dirt for older horses. Tactical race.
races.notes: Listed stakes — quality below Graded. Dragoon Guard (Cox/Irad) likely heavily backed. Without serious handicapping, pass or take a small win/place on Dragoon Guard if odds drift to 4-1+.

races.name: Longines Churchill Distaff Turf Mile
races.age: Fillies & Mares | 4 Year Olds And Up

field.name: Italian Soiree
field.notes: Motion turf-mile barn.

field.name: Sweet Rebecca
field.notes: ML favorite.

field.name: Portfolio Duration (GB)
field.notes: Brown's #1 turf entry. Brown owns this category.

field.name: Maggie Go (ARG)
field.notes: Brown's other entry.

races.pace: Turf mile, tactical. Brown/Mott/Motion barns dominate this class. 9-horse field manageable.
races.notes: Brown enters two — Portfolio Duration (4-1) and Maggie Go (8-1). Pin Up Betty at 7-2 is the lurker for Maker. If model surfaces value, consider WIN on Brown entry or exacta key Brown horse over Pin Up Betty/Sweet Rebecca.

races.name: Pat Day Mile

field.name: Englishman
field.notes: 2-for-2. Romped Fair Grounds Feb earning 95 Beyer. Stakes debut. Inside post, tactical speed.

field.name: Crude Velocity
field.notes: Co-favorite. Baffert + Geroux. Lightly raced focal horse.

field.name: Great White
field.notes: WAIT — listed in Derby too. Likely scratched here if running Derby. Confirm at track.

races.pace: Mile is tactical. Englishman has both class and tactical speed. Crude Velocity also tactical. Likely a two-horse race up front.
races.notes: Englishman vs Crude Velocity is the focal matchup. Both 5/2 to 3/1 — fair prices for both. Possible exacta box 1-6 ($4 for $2 base). If Englishman drifts to 7/2+ post-time, primary WIN. NOTE: Great White is also listed in the Derby at #21 (AE) — confirm scratch at track.

races.name: American Turf

field.name: Let's Be Frank
field.notes: Aragona TOP pick. Maiden on the way in. Inside post helps tendency to lug in. ML drifted to 30-1 = significant overlay if Aragona right.

field.name: Stark Contrast
field.notes: Both analysts have him 3rd.

field.name: Black Hornet
field.notes: Beer's TOP pick at 20-1. Perfect 2-for-2 turf. Bad-trip excuse for synthetic loss. MAJOR VALUE.

field.name: Remember Mamba
field.notes: Undefeated 3-for-3. Likely tote favorite. Drew bad post 12.

field.name: Final Score
field.notes: Pletcher + Irad.

races.pace: Big-field 14-horse turf chaos. Trips matter more than pace — wide draws hurt.
races.notes: Big-field turf race = chaos. Black Hornet at 20-1 is the standout value (Beer #1). Let's Be Frank at 30-1 is a major overlay (Aragona #1) IF you trust the trip-troubled maiden angle. SUGGESTED: WIN on #6 Black Hornet at 15-1+. Trifecta key: #6 Black Hornet OVER #2/#4/#12 OVER #2/#4/#7/#8 — costs ~$24 for $1 base, swings hard if Black Hornet wins.

races.name: Churchill Downs Stakes

field.name: Disco Time
field.notes: Cox entry.

field.name: Cornucopian
field.notes: Baffert.

field.name: Disruptor
field.notes: Mailloux top pick. Stepped up in last two without reservation.

field.name: Knightsbridge
field.notes: ML favorite. Class jump questions per analysts. Likely underlay.

field.name: Imagination
field.notes: Buccola top pick. 7f distance is opposite of his sprint weakness — fits perfect.

field.name: T O Elvis
field.notes: Japan import.

races.pace: 7f is speed-favoring. Imagination has the speed and the distance fits. Cornucopian also tactical.
races.notes: Knightsbridge is the likely overbet favorite. Imagination at 6-1 (Buccola top, distance fits) is the value angle. Disruptor at 8-1 (Mailloux top) is the other live one. SUGGESTED: WIN on #7 Imagination. Exacta key #7 OVER #5 Disruptor / #6 Knightsbridge / #2 Cornucopian.

races.name: Old Forester Bourbon Turf Classic

field.name: Corruption
field.notes: Aragona TOP pick at 15-1. Won at Churchill at 9f before. Tactical edge with Velazquez. MAJOR VALUE.

field.name: Asbury Park (GB)
field.notes: Both analysts #2. Brown wins this race a lot.

field.name: Program Trading (GB)
field.notes: Brown's other entry — stronger market signal.

field.name: Rhetorical
field.notes: Heavy ML favorite. Possible underlay if class-testing.

field.name: Test Score
field.notes: Beer's top pick. 3-for-4 at 1 1/8 turf incl. G1 Belmont Derby and Pegasus WC Turf. CLASS horse.

races.pace: 1 1/8 turf is Test Score's wheelhouse. Class likely decides it; tactical turf race.
races.notes: Test Score is the class horse but 7/2 isn't huge value. Corruption at 15-1 is the strong overlay if Velazquez gets a tactical trip. SUGGESTED: WIN on #1 Corruption (Aragona #1, value play) AND/OR small WIN on #9 Test Score (Beer #1, class). Trifecta: #9 Test Score OVER #1 Corruption / #3 Asbury Park / #10 Make Me King OVER same.

races.name: Kentucky Derby

field.name: Renegade
field.notes: ML fav at 4-1. Won G1 Arkansas Derby. Closer. NEGATIVES: Post 1 (no winner since 1986). Pletcher 0-13 last Derby starters. Ortiz 0-9 lifetime CD. Demling fade. Even more overbet now.

field.name: Albus
field.notes: Off-pace. Won G2 Wood Memorial. Riley Mott first Derby starter.

field.name: Intrepido
field.notes: Stalker — fits pace setup. 4th Santa Anita Derby. Fastest 5f workout of field. Live longshot.

field.name: Litmus Test
field.notes: 7th Arkansas Derby. Sired by 2016 Derby winner. Baffert always live but form underwhelming.

field.name: Right to Party
field.notes: SCRATCHED.

field.name: Commandment
field.notes: Won G1 Florida Derby. Multiple 100+ Beyers (101). STALKER fits projected pace meltdown. Strong play.

field.name: Danon Bourbon
field.notes: Demling top pick. Japanese, romped Fukuryu Stakes by 10L. First U.S. start. Front-runner — could wire. 20-1 is real overlay.

field.name: So Happy
field.notes: Won Santa Anita Derby. Stalker. Drifted from 6-1 to 15-1 ML — significant value if you respect SA Derby form.

field.name: The Puma
field.notes: SCRATCHED — leg swelling from skin infection.

field.name: Incredibolt
field.notes: Won Virginia Derby. Tightened from 37-1 to 20-1 — market sees something. Pedigree-driven.

field.name: Chief Wallabee
field.notes: 3rd Florida Derby behind Commandment. Pressing stalker. Only 3 races. Tightened to 8-1 — pace fit holds.

field.name: Silent Tactic
field.notes: SCRATCHED — foot injury.

field.name: Potente
field.notes: 2nd Santa Anita Derby. SPEED — gets compromised by other front-runners.

field.name: Emerging Market
field.notes: Won Louisiana Derby. Mid-pack. Only 2 career starts — extreme inexperience for Derby.

field.name: Pavlovian
field.notes: Front-runner. SPEED in speed-laden field — likely cooked.

field.name: Six Speed
field.notes: Front-runner. SPEED in speed field — cooked.

field.name: Further Ado
field.notes: Won G1 Blue Grass with 106 Beyer (TOP figure, +5pts on next). Stalker — perfect pace fit. PRIMARY play. Tightened to 6-1.

field.name: Golden Tempo
field.notes: Deep closer. 3rd Louisiana Derby. By Curlin (stamina). Lives if pace truly collapses — bomb potential for tri/super.

field.name: Fulleffort
field.notes: SCRATCHED — ankle injury.

field.name: Great White
field.notes: 5th Blue Grass. 17.2 hands. Underbet on appearance — but form says no. Also entered Pat Day Mile.

field.name: Ocelli
field.notes: MAIDEN (0-for-6). Should not be in this race. Pure dart.

field.name: Robusta
field.notes: Front-runner. 7th Santa Anita Derby. O'Neill won Derby twice but speed cooked here.

field.name: Corona de Oro
field.notes: Also-eligible — only runs if more scratches. Stewart longshot specialist.

races.pace: FAST PACE PROJECTED. Multiple front-runners (Pavlovian, Six Speed, Robusta, Danon Bourbon, Potente) likely produce ~45.5 half mile. Historically benefits stalkers/mid-pack closers — Further Ado, Commandment, Chief Wallabee profile best.
races.notes: PRIMARY: Further Ado (#18) — top Beyer + perfect pace fit. SECONDARY: Commandment (#6) — figures + pace fit. VALUE OVERLAYS: Danon Bourbon (#7) at 20-1, So Happy (#8) at 15-1, Chief Wallabee (#12) at 8-1. SUGGESTED TICKETS: (a) WIN on #18 Further Ado at 6-1+. (b) WIN on #7 Danon Bourbon and/or #8 So Happy as overlay plays. (c) $2 Exacta box Further Ado/Commandment ($4). (d) $1 Trifecta key: #18 Further Ado OVER #6 Commandment / #12 Chief Wallabee / #7 Danon Bourbon / #3 Intrepido OVER same 4 = $24, pays huge if Further Ado wins. (e) Optional bomb: $2 Win on Golden Tempo (#19) or Intrepido (#3) as pace-collapse plays. AVOID: Renegade (overbet rail), Ocelli (#22 maiden), pure speed bombs (#16/#17/#23).

races.name: Allowance Optional Claiming

field.name: Heartily
field.notes: Ward is sprint specialist.

field.name: Gilded Bandit
field.notes: Mott + Alvarado.

field.name: Buetane
field.notes: Baffert + Irad. ML favorite.

races.notes: Post-Derby allowance. Buetane (Baffert/Irad) and Gilded Bandit (Mott/Alvarado) the morning-line standouts. Stay disciplined after the Derby payout (or non-payout) — don't chase.

races.name: Maiden Special Weight

field.name: Interrogator
field.notes: Asmussen + Irad.

field.name: Act of Parliament
field.notes: Cox MSW.

field.name: Big Jake
field.notes: Baffert + Prat.

races.notes: Final race of the day. Big-field maiden = lottery. Pass unless you've handicapped from the program. Discipline > sunk-cost fallacy.
